description: Registry of supported prediction task types for the MLGG standard. Defines the metrics, thresholds, baseline requirements, and sample size rules for each prediction type. Version 1.0 supports binary classification only; versions 1.1+ will add multiclass, regression, and survival.

binary.name: Binary Classification
binary.description: Predicts whether an event will occur (y ∈ {0, 1}). The target is a binary label. Examples: mortality prediction, readmission, disease diagnosis.

primary_metric.name: pr_auc
primary_metric.description: Area under the Precision-Recall curve. Preferred for imbalanced medical datasets.

publication_floor.note: Floors are minimum requirements; not sufficient on their own for publication

multiclass.name: Multiclass Classification
multiclass.description: Predicts which of K ≥ 3 mutually exclusive categories an observation belongs to (y ∈ {0, 1, ..., K-1}). Examples: disease staging (stages I-IV), triage acuity (ESI 1-5), diagnostic category.

primary_metric.name: macro_roc_auc
primary_metric.description: Macro-averaged one-vs-rest AUC. Treats each class equally regardless of prevalence.

multiclass.note: Not yet supported in MLGG v1.0. Pipeline will fail with informative error if prediction_type=multiclass is specified.

regression.name: Regression (Continuous Outcome)
regression.description: Predicts a continuous numeric outcome (y ∈ ℝ). Examples: predicted length of stay, predicted lab value, predicted clinical score, predicted days to event.

additional_request_fields.outcome_unit: string describing the outcome units (e.g., 'days', 'mg/dL'), recommended

primary_metric.name: r_squared
primary_metric.description: Coefficient of determination (R²). Proportion of variance explained by the model.
primary_metric.alternative: rmse or mae depending on clinical context

regression.note: Not yet supported in MLGG v1.0. Pipeline will fail with informative error if prediction_type=regression is specified.

survival.name: Survival Analysis / Time-to-Event
survival.description: Predicts the time until an event occurs, accounting for censoring. Examples: time to sepsis, time to readmission, overall survival, progression-free survival.

additional_request_fields.event_col: column name for event indicator (1=event, 0=censored), required
additional_request_fields.prediction_horizons: list of time points for evaluation (e.g., [30, 90, 365]), recommended

primary_metric.name: harrell_c_index
primary_metric.description: Harrell's concordance index (C-index). Proportion of all usable pairs where the model correctly orders the predicted risk.

survival.note: Not yet supported in MLGG v1.0. Pipeline will fail with informative error if prediction_type=survival is specified.

unsupported_type_error.message_template: prediction_type '{type}' is not supported in MLGG v{version}. Supported types: {supported}. Planned support in {planned_version}.

backward_compatibility.rule: If prediction_type field is absent from request.json, defaults to 'binary'. This ensures all existing pipelines continue to work without modification.
